# Copilot Instructions

This is a Vite + React + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS project.

## Project Setup

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements - React TypeScript with Tailwind CSS
- [x] Scaffold the Project - Vite React TypeScript template
- [x] Customize the Project - Tailwind CSS configured
- [x] Install Required Extensions - None required
- [x] Compile the Project - Dependencies installed
- [ ] Create and Run Task - Ready to configure
- [ ] Launch the Project - Ready to start dev server
- [ ] Ensure Documentation is Complete - In progress

## Available Scripts

- `npm run dev` - Start development server
- `npm run build` - Build for production
- `npm run preview` - Preview production build
- `npm run lint` - Run ESLint

## Tech Stack

- **Build Tool**: Vite
- **Framework**: React 18
- **Language**: TypeScript
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS
- **CSS Processing**: PostCSS with Autoprefixer
